parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The path and name of the point file to load.

parameters.name: reload
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Re-import and load the geometry.

parameters.name: createpointprim
parameters.label: Create Point Primitives
parameters.description: Enable creating point primitives

parameters.name: maxpointsenable
parameters.label: Max Number of Points
parameters.description: Enable the setting of the max number of points.

parameters.name: maxpoints
parameters.label: Max Number of Points
parameters.description: Sets the max number of points when the automatic max number of points is overriden.

parameters.name: positionfields
parameters.label: Position Fields
parameters.description: Fields mapped to the position.

parameters.name: normalfields
parameters.label: Normal Fields
parameters.description: Fields for the normal attribute.

parameters.name: texturefields
parameters.label: Texture Fields
parameters.description: Fields mapped to the texture coordinates.

parameters.name: colorfields
parameters.label: Color Fields
parameters.description: The fields to use for the color attribute.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute conditions.

parameters.name: attr0fields
parameters.label: Fields
parameters.description: Determines fields that can be used to create additional attributes.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: Attribute Name
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0isarray
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Attribute is an array, for example 5 float3 values is an array of size 5.

parameters.name: attr0arraysize
parameters.label: Array Size
parameters.description: Nunber of elements in the array.

parameters.name: thinoutrange
parameters.label: Thin Out Range
parameters.description: Enable index-based point filtering.

parameters.name: thinrangestart
parameters.label: Thin Range Start
parameters.description: Determines the starting index for range-based point filtering.

parameters.name: thinrangelength
parameters.label: Thin Range Length
parameters.description: Determines the number of points being filtered by index range.

parameters.name: thinstep
parameters.label: Thin Step
parameters.description: Filters every Nth point.

parameters.name: thinrandom
parameters.label: Thin Random
parameters.description: Determines the proportion of points randomly filtered.

parameters.name: thinrandomseed
parameters.label: Thin Random Seed
parameters.description: Sets the random seed for points being randomly filtered.

parameters.name: rerange
parameters.label: Rerange
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to re-range created attributes.

parameters.name: rerange0scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: Rerange any attribute from the file.

parameters.name: rerange0parsize
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: rerange0tohigh0
parameters.label: Rerange0Tohigh0
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: rerange0fromhigh0
parameters.label: Rerange0Fromhigh0
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: rerange0tolow0
parameters.label: Rerange0Tolow0
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: rerange0fromlow0
parameters.label: Rerange0Fromlow0
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
